app.name: NullDC4Wii alpha0.31
app.coder: Xale00, Skmp, NulldcTeam, Joseph Jordan, Flycast Team, AI
app.long_description:
NullDC4Wii is an attempt to port NullDC for Wii.
It has been compiled years ago but never released.
Put bios in sd:/apps/nulldc4wii/data/ Put games in sd:/discs/ or usb:/dreamcast/
